eu_ai_act.rationale: This system performs automated credit scoring and evaluation of creditworthiness, which is classified as high-risk under essential services.

nist_ai_rmf.rationale: Automated consumer lending involves high-stakes consumer impact, requiring critical attention on mapping risks and managing bias controls.

colorado_sb_205.rationale: Under Colorado state law, AI systems making consumer financial or lending decisions are high-risk consequential systems.

regulatory_exposure_summary: High regulatory exposure under EU AI Act Annex III(5)(b) and Colorado SB 205 (financial lending).
